sections.heading: Service Agreement
sections.body: By engaging LA Water Heaters for services, you agree to these terms. All work performed is covered by our written estimate and our 100% satisfaction guarantee.

sections.heading: Warranty
sections.body: All installation work carries a 5-year labor warranty. Manufacturer warranty terms apply to all parts and equipment. See your specific written estimate for full warranty terms.

sections.heading: Cancellation
sections.body: Appointments may be rescheduled with 24-hour notice. Same-day cancellations of confirmed appointments may incur a service fee.

sections.heading: License
sections.body: LA Water Heaters is licensed and insured.
